coffee.command.serverinfo.result.guessed: Detects the server's Anti Cheat by monitoring the ping parameter every time you join a game. Note that the results may not be accurate, especially if there are multiple anti-cheats on the server.

coffee.command.serverinfo.result.detectP: Re-run command with the detect parameter [%s] for more detailed information.
coffee.command.serverinfo.result.plugins: Plugin detection timed out. It may be due to the server blocking the request.

coffee.module.packetLogger.description: Prints all packets and their fields.
coffee.module.potionSpoof.description: Allows the player to have potion effects without actually having the potion.
coffee.module.ESP.description: Allows you to see targets through walls.
coffee.module.logoffSpot.description: Allows you to see where other players logged off.
coffee.module.logoffSpot.messages.unload: %s position was unloaded and is no longer visible.
coffee.module.abortBreaking.description: Allows you to abort breaking without losing progress.
coffee.module.animations.description: Allows you to modify many of game's animations.
coffee.module.antiAFK.description: Prevents you from being kicked for being AFK.
coffee.module.antiBlind.description: Protects you from potentially annoying screen effects that obscure your view.
coffee.module.antiBot.description: Detects bots spawned by Anti-Cheats and prevents you from attacking them.
coffee.module.antiBounce.description: Prevents you from bouncing on blocks.
coffee.module.antiCactus.description: Protects you against damage caused by touching cacti.
coffee.module.antiExploit.description: Prevents the server from exploiting client-side bugs.
coffee.module.antiLevitation.description: Prevents levitation and slow falling effects from affecting you.
coffee.module.antiReducedDebugInfo.descr: Allows you to see extended debug information.
coffee.module.antiStaff.description: Alerts you when the server's staff members are watching you.
coffee.module.antiStaff.messages.noStaff: There is no staff list available for %s.
coffee.module.antiStaff.messages.staffsF: Failed to load staff list for %s with code %s.
coffee.module.hitFX.description: Hitting a target triggers a special effect.
coffee.module.particles.description: Displays particles when attacking an entity.
coffee.module.autoAccount.description: Automatically authenticates you on cracked servers.
coffee.module.autoArmor.description: Automatically equips the best armor in your inventory.
coffee.module.autoShoot.description: Automatically throws eggs and snowballs at your targets or shoots in QuakeCraft.
coffee.module.autoBow.description: Automates many bow-related actions like aiming and shooting.
coffee.module.autoBreak.description: Automatically breaks the block you are looking at.
coffee.module.autoChatGame.description: Uses OpenAI to play chat games.
coffee.module.autoClicker.description: Clicks automatically when holding down the attack button.
coffee.module.autoConfig.description: Automatically applies the correct config for the server you are playing on.
coffee.module.autoFish.description: Automatically catches fish when using a rod.
coffee.module.autoBuff.description: Automatically buffs yourself using various items.
coffee.module.autoLeave.description: Automatically leaves the server whenever your health goes below the certain threshold.
coffee.module.autoPlay.description: Automatically enters queues and plays the game for you.
coffee.module.autoRod.description: Automatically uses fishing rod for combat.
coffee.module.autoTool.description: Automatically chooses the best tool in your inventory to mine a block.
coffee.module.autoWalk.description: Automatically makes you walk in the direction you are facing.
coffee.module.autoWeapon.description: Automatically selects the best weapon in your hotbar.
coffee.module.avoidHazards.description: Prevents you from walking into blocks that might affect you negatively.
coffee.module.backtrack.description: Causes targets to lag allowing you to attack them more efficiently.
coffee.module.blink.description: Makes it look as if you were teleporting to other players.
coffee.module.blockBounce.description: Allows you to bounce higher on bouncy blocks.
coffee.module.blockESP.description: Allows you to see selected blocks through walls.
coffee.module.blockOutline.description: Changes the way Minecraft highlights blocks.
coffee.module.blockWalk.description: Allows you to walk on non-full block blocks.
coffee.module.antiVoid.description: Protects you from falling into the void.
coffee.module.cameraClip.description: Allows you to clip the camera through walls in third person mode.
coffee.module.capeTransfer.description: Automatically transfers your donator cape to the current account. Donate at liquidbounce.net/donate.
coffee.module.chestCleaner.description: Automatically drops unwanted items from a chest.
coffee.module.chestStealer.description: Automatically steals all items from a chest.
coffee.module.clickGUI.description: Shows you an easy to use menu to toggle and configure modules.
coffee.module.clientSpoofer.description: Spoofs your game client brand to another.
coffee.module.clip.description: Allows you to clip through blocks.
coffee.module.criticals.description: Automatically deals critical damage every time you attack an entity.
coffee.module.crystalAura.description: Automatically places and destroys end crystals.
coffee.module.damage.description: Deals the specified amount of damage to yourself.
coffee.module.smartEat.description: Automatically eats food when your hunger is low.
coffee.module.derp.description: Makes it look as if you were derping around to other players
coffee.module.vomit.description: Vomit items out of your inventory.
coffee.module.disabler.description: Attempts to disable the AntiCheat of the server.
coffee.module.disabler.messages.info: Check your configuration in the Disabler module to make sure it is correct for the server or anti-cheat. If not, not only will this module not work, it may even flag you.
coffee.module.disabler.messages.vulcanRi: You need to have a trident enchanted with Riptide in your offhand in order to bypass Vulcan movement checks.
coffee.module.disabler.messages.grimSpec: You were flagged! You should disable disabler.

Enable this Disabler during Respawning - when you have Fly abilities. You should be able to fly around and break blocks, but cannot attack other players during this. Disable it as soon as possible, otherwise you will be timed out.
coffee.module.disabler.messages.miniblox: Miniblox disabler only works with ViaFabricPlus on protocol 1.8.X.
coffee.module.disabler.messages.cubecraf: Cubecraft Full Disabler. To use this please dont use Fakelag and Backtrack otherwise it will not work.
Cubecraft Disabler cannot be enabled in single player.
coffee.module.antiCheatDetect.descriptio: Detects the AntiCheat of the server and notifies you.
coffee.module.eagle.description: Automatically sneaks at the edge of a block
coffee.module.easyPearl.description: Throws pearl to where you looking at.
coffee.module.easyPearl.messages.noInRea: You are aiming more than the ender pearl can reach, and this has helped you cancel the throw
coffee.module.elytraRecast.description: Recasts elytra while holding jump key.
coffee.module.elytraFly.messages.altitud: Warning: Altitude too low for optimal performance. Recommended height: %sY
coffee.module.targets.description: Allows you to manage which entities are considered to be your targets.
coffee.module.extendedFirework.descripti: Extends the velocity of firework rocket boost.
coffee.module.esp.description: Highlights all targets allowing you to see them through walls.
coffee.module.fakeLag.description: Holds back packets so as to prevent you from being hit by an enemy.
coffee.module.fastBreak.description: Allows you to break blocks faster.
coffee.module.fastPlace.description: Allows you to place blocks faster.
coffee.module.fastUse.description: Allows you to use items faster.
coffee.module.fly.description: Allows you to fly in survival mode.
coffee.module.fly.messages.vulcanGhostNe: Fly anywhere where you want to go in ghost mode. When you are ready, press your use button, jump up and walk anywhere and you will be setback to wherever you moved.
coffee.module.fly.messages.vulcanGhostOl: Fly anywhere where you want to go. When you want to land, walk off a ledge or jump up and walk in any direction. If AutoDisable is disabled, disable module.
coffee.module.fly.messages.cubecraft20th: Fly only works through damage abuse. Wait a few seconds until you're ready to fly on a round start!
coffee.module.fly.messages.setbackDetect: You have been set back by the server! Fly has been disabled to prevent further setbacks.
coffee.module.targetLock.description: Makes you attack only one specific enemy.
coffee.module.targetLock.messages.timeUp: No longer locked on %s because the time is up.
coffee.module.targetLock.messages.outOfR: No longer locked on %s because they are out of range.
coffee.module.betterChat.value.infiniteL: Disables the 100 messages chat history limit.
coffee.module.betterChat.value.antiClear: Protects your chat from being cleared.
Send a more advanced screenshot message with copying as quick action.
coffee.module.freeCam.description: Allows you to move the camera out of your body.
coffee.module.freeLook.description: Allows you to move the camera freely around your character.
coffee.module.freeze.description: Allows you to freeze yourself in your current position without the server knowing.
coffee.module.middleClickAction.messages: %s was successfully added to the friends list.
coffee.module.middleClickAction.descript: Allows you to perform actions with middle clicks.
coffee.module.middleClickAction.messages: %s was successfully removed from the friends list.
coffee.module.fucker.description: Destroys or interacts with selected blocks around you.
coffee.module.fullBright.description: Makes the world a brighter place.
coffee.module.ghostHand.description: Allows you to interact with selected blocks through walls.
coffee.module.handDerp.description: Switches between main and offhand constantly.
coffee.module.hats.description: Render a hat above the player's head.
coffee.module.hitbox.description: Enlarges the hit box of targets.
coffee.module.holeESP.description: Detects and displays safe spots for crystal PvP.
coffee.module.holeFiller.description: Automatically fills safe spots for crystal PvP.
coffee.module.hud.description: Shows an in-game overlay with various useful tools.
coffee.module.hud.messages.hidingAppeara: The client appearance is currently hidden. Use '.client appearance show' to re-enable it.
coffee.module.autoTrap.description: Automatically sets targets on fire or traps them in cobwebs.
coffee.module.extinguish.description: Automatically extinguishes yourself when on fire.
coffee.module.inventoryCleaner.descripti: Automatically sorts your inventory and drops unnecessary items.
coffee.module.inventoryMove.description: Allows you to walk while an inventory is opened.
coffee.module.inventoryMove.messages.bli: You are no longer lagging and we closed your screen.
coffee.module.inventoryTracker.descripti: Tracks the inventories of other players.
coffee.module.itemEsp.description: Allows you to see dropped items through walls.
coffee.module.jumpEffect.description: Shows an effect beneath your feet when jumping.
coffee.module.keepChatAfterDeath.descrip: Allows you to use the chat on the death screen.
coffee.module.keepSprint.description: Keeps you sprinting even when attacking.
coffee.module.clickTp.description: Teleports you to the block you are looking at when pressing MIDDLE_CLICK. Only works on Vulcan 286 anti-cheat.
coffee.module.clickTp.messages.noSuitabl: %s, %s, %s is not suitable to teleport to.
coffee.module.crosshair.description: Changes the style of your crosshair.
coffee.module.teleport.messages.useComma: Use .tp x y z to teleport to a specific location
coffee.module.teleport.messages.teleport: %s server-side teleports left until you are being teleported to your desired location.
coffee.module.kick.messages.cantEnableIn: Kick cannot be enabled in single player.
coffee.module.tpAura.description: Automatically teleports and attacks enemies around you.
coffee.module.killAura.messages.badCoold: The cooldown should be at least 1.0, otherwise you will not be able to deal critical damage properly.
coffee.module.noMissCooldown.description: Disables 1.8 hit cooldown or cancels missed attacks entirely.
coffee.module.maceKill.description: Instant kill when using the Mace
coffee.module.liquidWalk.description: Allows you to walk on water.
coffee.module.mobOwners.description: Allows you to see which player a tamed entity or projectile belongs to.
coffee.module.moreCarry.description: Allows you to store additional items in your crafting slots (only works in multiplayer).
coffee.module.murderMystery.description: Tells you who the murderer is.
coffee.module.nameCollector.description: Collects the names of all players on the server.
coffee.module.nameProtect.description: Hides the player's real username client-side (useful for videos).
coffee.module.nametags.description: Improves the visibility of player's name tags and show additional information.
coffee.module.itemTags.description: Display icons and quantities labels for dropped items.
coffee.module.phase.description: Allows you to phase through blocks by exploiting the anti-cheat.
coffee.module.noClip.description: Allows you to move through blocks (let a sand block drop on your head first).
coffee.module.noClip.messages.setbackDet: You have been set back by the server! Make sure you are already standing inside of a block.
coffee.module.noFOV.description: Disables FOV from changing during movement.
coffee.module.noFall.description: Protects you from taking fall damage.
coffee.module.noHurtCam.description: Disables the camera effect when getting hurt.
coffee.module.noInterpolation.descriptio: Reduces entity interpolation steps to make position updates appear more immediate.
coffee.module.noPitchLimit.description: Allows you to rotate your head beyond the regular limits.
coffee.module.noPush.description: Protects you from being pushed around by other players.
coffee.module.noRotateSet.description: Prevents the server from being able to rotate your head.
coffee.module.noSlotSet.description: Disallows forced slot changes by server.
coffee.module.noSlow.description: Cancels slowness effects caused by blocks and using items.
coffee.module.noSlowBreak.description: Automatically adjusts breaking speed when in negatively affecting situations.
coffee.module.noPose.description: Prevents entity pose changes for low version servers.
coffee.module.noWeb.description: Disables slow down caused by webs.
coffee.module.elytraSwap.description: Allows to quickly replace the chestplate with an elytra and vice versa.
coffee.module.notifier.description: Notifies you about all kinds of events.
coffee.module.nuker.description: Automatically destroys all blocks in your area. Be careful!
coffee.module.parkour.description: Automatically jumps at the very edge of a block.
coffee.module.entityControl.description: Allows you to control rideable entities without a saddle.
coffee.module.pingSpoof.description: Spoofs your ping to a specified value.
coffee.module.pingSpoof.messages.cantEna: PingSpoof cannot be enabled in single player.
coffee.module.plugins.description: Attempts to list all plugins installed on the server.
coffee.module.portalMenu.description: Allows you to open menus while standing inside a portal.
coffee.module.projectilePuncher.descript: Shoots back incoming projectiles around you.
coffee.module.quickPerspectiveSwap.descr: Allows you to quickly change the game's perspective.
coffee.module.textFieldProtect.descripti: Hides rendered text of text field widget when it matches certain patterns.
coffee.module.timeShift.description: Abuses Minecraft 1.8 mechanics to allow faster regeneration and removes negative status effects like fire and poison.
coffee.module.timeShift.messages.warning: WARNING: Time Shift (Regen, Zoot, etc.) is only supported on 1.8 Minecraft Server! However, your client version can be higher (1.17+) in order to bypass.
coffee.module.translationFix.description: Prevents servers from knowing about your installed mods through the vanilla translation vulnerability.
coffee.module.resetVL.description: Resets anticheat violations on flawed anti-cheats.
coffee.module.resourceSpoof.description: Makes it seem like you accepted a resource pack to the server.
coffee.module.reverseStep.description: Makes you step down blocks faster.
coffee.module.richPresence.description: Displays information about the client in your Discord rich presence.
coffee.module.rotations.description: Allows you to see server-sided rotations.
coffee.module.silentHotbar.description: Disables showing silently selected items in your hand.
coffee.module.safeWalk.description: Prevents you from falling down block (as if you were sneaking).
coffee.module.snapTap.description: Prioritize the last pressed movement key.
coffee.module.scaffold.description: Automatically places blocks beneath your feet allowing you to walk across gaps.
coffee.module.serverCrasher.description: Attempts to crash the server by exploiting known bugs.
coffee.module.serverCrasher.messages.sin: Server Crasher is intended for multiplayer servers only.
coffee.module.serverCrasher.messages.sig: ViaFabricPlus is required for this exploit to work.
Select 1.8 as protocol version for this exploit to work.
Successfully altered sign packet with exploit.
coffee.module.serverCrasher.messages.bun: You need to be holding a bundle containing at least one item.
coffee.module.spider.description: Allows you to climb walls like spiderman.
coffee.module.skinDerp.description: Makes the different layers of your skin turn on and off.
coffee.module.skinChanger.description: Hides the player's real skin client-side (useful for videos).
coffee.module.sleepWalker.description: Allows you to walk while sleeping and decreases the size of your hit box.
coffee.module.spammer.description: Spams the chat with specified messages.
coffee.module.autoF5.description: Automatically enables F5 mode when opening the inventory or a chest.
coffee.module.step.description: Allows you to step up blocks faster.
coffee.module.storageESP.description: Highlights all blocks that can contain items allowing you to see them rough walls.
coffee.module.strafe.description: Allows you to strafe while being in mid-air.
coffee.module.superKnockback.description: Increases knockback dealt to other entities.
coffee.module.swingFix.description: Fixes swing packet order for 1.8 servers in-case their anti-cheat is outdated.
coffee.module.swordBlock.description: Enables 1.8 sword blocking on servers using ViaVersion
coffee.module.teams.description: Prevents KillAura from attacking team mates.
coffee.module.terrainSpeed.description: Allows you to move faster on specific surfaces.
coffee.module.timer.description: Changes the speed the game is running at.
coffee.module.strongholdFinder.descripti: Tracks Eye of Ender throws and predicts the strongest stronghold chunk candidate.
coffee.module.timerRange.description: Accelerates the game time when being within the range of an enemy.
coffee.module.tickBase.description: Buffer ticks to get early hits on an enemy.
coffee.module.tracers.description: Draws a line to targets within a certain radius.
coffee.module.trajectories.description: Allows you to see where projectiles will land.
coffee.module.trueSight.description: Allows you to see invisible objects and entities.
coffee.module.vehicleControl.description: Allows you to fly and speed while riding an entity (like boats or horses).
coffee.module.vehicleControl.messages.qu: To exit the vehicle, land on the ground and press the sneak button.
coffee.module.vehicleControl.messages.ve: The vehicle is too far away to be reached.
coffee.module.vehicleBoost.description: Boost you when leaving a vehicle.
coffee.module.vehicleOneHit.description: Allows you to break any vehicle with a single hit.
coffee.module.velocity.description: Modifies the amount of velocity you take.
coffee.module.voidEsp.description: Highlight all surrounding positions that may be void.
coffee.module.zoom.description: Allows you to make everything in your world appear smaller or bigger.
coffee.module.antiHunger.messages.warnSp: Another module caused sprint packets, which could lead to hunger.
coffee.module.antiHunger.messages.warnBr: You are breaking a block, which could lead to hunger.
coffee.module.liquidChat.description: Allows you to chat with other Coffee V2 users.
coffee.module.consoleSpammer.description: Spams the server's console with error messages.
coffee.module.autoQueue.description: Automatically enters mini game queues on servers.
coffee.module.bungeeSpoofer.description: Allows you to connect to bungee-cord protected sub-server by faking the BungeeCord handshake.
coffee.module.customAmbience.description: Allows you to override the world ambience.
coffee.module.translation.description: Setting up an auto translator for a client.
coffee.module.bedPlates.description: Allows you to see what blocks are around the bed
coffee.module.targetStrafe.description: Automatically strafes around enemies targeted by KillAura.
coffee.module.autoShop.description: Automatically buys specific items in a BedWars shop.
coffee.module.liquidPlace.description: Allows you to place blocks on liquids.
coffee.module.multiActions.description: Allows you to do multiple things at the same time.
coffee.module.bedDefender.description: Automatically places blocks to defend your bed in BedWars.
coffee.module.itemScroller.description: Quickly moves items in the inventory with the SHIFT and LMB pressed
coffee.module.dupe.description: Attempts to Auto-Dupe items from your inventory by using exploits.
coffee.module.dupe.messages.singleplayer: You can't perform dupe exploits in the singleplayer mode, because they exploit server bugs. Use creative mode instead.
coffee.module.dupe.messages.creative: You are in creative mode, why would you want to dupe?
coffee.module.dupe.messages.requiresItem: You need a %s in your hotbar to perform the dupe.
coffee.module.surround.description: Builds holes that protect you from explosion damage.
coffee.module.packetMine.description: Allows you to mine blocks by clicking them once.
coffee.module.packetMine.messages.noVfp: Either choose another switch method or install via fabric plus!
coffee.module.itemChams.description: Applies visual effects to your held items.
coffee.module.betterTab.description: Multiple improvements to the tab list.
coffee.module.betterTitle.description: Improvements to the title and subtitle.
coffee.module.noBlockInteract.descriptio: Prevents you from interacting with blocks.
coffee.module.noEntityInteract.descripti: Prevents you from interacting with entities.
coffee.module.autoPearl.description: Aims and throws a pearl at an enemies pearl trajectory.
coffee.module.replenish.description: Automatically refills your hotbar with items from your inventory when the count drops to a certain threshold.
coffee.module.anchor.description: Pulls you into safe holes for crystal PvP.
coffee.module.autoWindCharge.description: Automatically boosts you using wind charges when holding jump.
coffee.module.autoMobHeal.description: Automatically heals nearby vanilla-healable mobs using their vanilla repair or feeding items.
coffee.module.airPlace.description: Allows you to place blocks in mid-air.
coffee.module.autoCrafter.description: Automatically crafts items using the Recipe Book.
coffee.module.liquidFiller.description: Places blocks inside of liquid source blocks within range of you.
coffee.module.liquidFiller.value.placeOr: Controls the order in which liquid source blocks are queued for placing.
coffee.module.liquidFiller.value.useSpon: Uses sponge for water source blocks to absorb nearby water with vanilla sponge behavior.
coffee.module.notebot.description: Automatically plays note block songs from NBS (Note Block Song) file.
coffee.module.notebot.messages.notEnough: Not enough note blocks in range, required are:
coffee.module.notebot.messages.notInGame: You must be in game to use this module.
coffee.module.notebot.messages.inCreativ: You can't use this module in creative mode!
coffee.module.notebot.messages.packetMin: The Notebot Module is incompatible with PacketMine!
coffee.module.radar.description: Shows the direction of rendered entities on GUI.
coffee.module.guiCloser.description: Closes GUIs if their title matches specified patterns.
coffee.module.yggdrasilSignatureFix.desc: Disables Authlib Yggdrasil signature check, may fix missing skins on some servers.
coffee.module.reportHelper.description: Automatically starts a report and confirms it for you.
coffee.module.protectionZones.descriptio: Allows you to see areas protected by protection blocks and suggests optimal placement spots.
coffee.module.macros.description: Lets you execute chat messages or item actions using custom keybinds.
coffee.module.newChunks.description: Highlights chunks that are likely newly generated.
